strategy_reasoning: Using a cozy, Stardew Valley-inspired aesthetic to translate technical backend updates (API routing, model support, attribution tracking) into warm, tangible scenes. Rotating the cast keeps the carousel engaging while maintaining the brand's low-fi, anti-corporate vibe.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art, soft pastel gradients, warm Stardew Valley-esque lighting, chunky sprites, prominently featuring lime green (#ecf874).

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing tiny retro headphones and painting on a glowing digital canvas that transforms a rough sketch into a beautiful landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients.
images.description: Polly the bee painting with headphones on, representing image-to-image for flux-2-dev and Suno audio routing fixes.

images.prompt: Chunky pixel art of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and stubby arms holding a glowing golden digital key next to a retro wooden bulletin board. The cute pixel art bee mascot with yellow body, dark brown stripes, and tiny wings hovers nearby, pinning a glowing note to the board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, warm lighting. Cozy pixel art, emotionally warm.
images.description: Monitor Robot holding an API key while Polly pins a news update, representing BYOP settings, app attribution, and the pinned news section.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a round tan mochi-ball creature with tiny dot eyes and wide happy mouth happily eating a stack of complicated paperwork. Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM' in pixel font. The cute pixel art bee mascot hovers nearby, watering six glowing new code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
images.description: Nomnom eating old PR friction while Polly waters six new community apps, representing the smoothed submission pipeline and new ecosystem additions.

caption:
11 PRs merged this week. The big one: image-to-image is now live for flux-2-dev. You can now send us pixels and get different pixels back. We also fixed Suno audio routing so your music generation actually goes to the right place.

Behind the scenes, we added better app attribution for publishable keys and smoothed out the community app submission pipeline. Nomnom ate the old paperwork.

Six new community apps just sprouted in the ecosystem this week, including PromptLab Studio and a fantasy story generator. Everything is open source, as always. Link in bio to build something.
alt_text: A carousel of three pixel art images featuring Polly the bee, a monitor-headed robot, and a round creature named Nomnom. They are painting, organizing a bulletin board, and watering code plants in a cozy, retro video game style with lime green and pastel colors.
